description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a predominantly white and light gray exterior. The front features a large transparent display window showcasing rows of assorted beverages, with a price sign reading '100¥' prominently displayed. The right and left sides are decorated with a large, stylized black-and-white manga illustration of a girl in a school uniform, accompanied by Japanese text. The machine includes a payment interface with coin and bill slots, as well as a product retrieval slot at the bottom front. Vents are visible at the lower rear, suggesting internal cooling mechanisms. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually striking, blending functional vending elements with pop culture artwork.
description: A white vending machine with a transparent front display, manga artwork on the sides, and a visible payment and retrieval interface.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large manga illustration and Japanese text on a white background.
description_view_1: Rear view with a plain white panel and a vent at the bottom, no artwork or interactive features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the manga illustration and Japanese text seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the transparent product window, payment interface, product retrieval slot, and a '100¥' price sign.
attribute_display_panel: A large transparent display window on the front, occupying most of the upper section, showing beverage products and a '100¥' price sign.
attribute_payment_interface: Coin slot and bill acceptor located to the right of the display window, with a small keypad or button interface below.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A small set of individual buttons or a keypad below the payment interface, likely corresponding to product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide rectangular slot at the bottom front, beneath the display window, for retrieving purchased products.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large black-and-white manga illustration and Japanese text on both side panels; '100¥' price sign in red and white on the front display.
